name: social-video-downloader
title: Social Video Downloader - YouTube TikTok Instagram X Facebook
description: Extract video download URLs and metadata from 5 social platforms: YouTube (videos + Shorts), TikTok, Twitter/X, Instagram (Reels + posts), Facebook. Direct download links with title, author, thumbnail, duration. Bulk URL processing, JSON/CSV/Excel export. Free yt-dlp cloud alternative. No API keys, no login. Ideal for social media archiving, content backup, competitor analysis, and research datasets. Pay-per-use from $0.01/video.
